plan.goal: Add OpenAI GPT-5.5 as a first-class supported model, retire the `codex-latest` alias, and make `gpt-5.5` the default value of `DEFAULT_FALLBACK_CHAIN` so Anthropic sessions fail over to it out of the box. Preserve backward compatibility for users with `codex-latest` already persisted in config.

1.description: TDD: add gpt-5.5 pricing entry ($5/$30/M, $0.50 cache) to default_pricing_table in src/config/pricing.rs.

2.description: TDD: add gpt-5.5 entry (1M context window) to MODEL_CONTEXT_WINDOWS in src/config/models.rs.

3.description: TDD: add soft-migration shim in resolve_fallback_chain that rewrites legacy codex-latest entries to gpt-5.5 with a one-time deprecation warning.

4.description: Switch DEFAULT_FALLBACK_CHAIN constant to gpt-5.5 and update the three affected test fixtures in src/config/mod.rs.

5.description: Remove the codex-latest alias surface (const, static, functions, tests, doc) from src/config/models.rs; build will break until Task 6.

6.description: Update callers of removed codex-latest symbols in src/proxy/server.rs, src/proxy/commands.rs, src/cli/status.rs, src/proxy/session.rs; then full build + test + commit.

7.description: Update README.md: replace codex-latest references with gpt-5.5 across commands, tables, status output, config, and env-var docs.

8.description: End-to-end spot-check against isolated test proxy on port 9001: verify fallbackChain default, models table entry, and soft-migration deprecation warning.
